messages.content:

Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?

context.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
context.anomaly_observed: The renewal is close to a committee threshold and has an old committee-warning note.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Renewal REN-WRE-077 extends Wren Services support for 12 months at USD 50750.
Committee-warning note WARN-WRE-077 says renewals near USD 50000 should verify delegation ceiling before release.
Delegation DEL-WRE-077 authorizes Wren Services support renewal, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, signed 2026-06-27 before release.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Near-threshold renewal is complete when delegation authority matches vendor, renewal class, term, amount ceiling, and signature date before release. Committee review is not required below the amount ceiling.
